title: Traveler preferences
description: A typed preference for one traveler that the concierge, packer, and scheduler read to personalize the trip — a diet restriction, a mobility need, an interest, a pace preference.

travelerId.description: the traveler this preference belongs to

category.description: 'diet' | 'mobility' | 'interest' | 'pace' | 'budget' | 'other' — how the preference should be applied

value.description: the preference itself, e.g. 'vegetarian', 'no long hikes', 'loves museums', 'slow mornings'

weight.description: how strongly to weigh this (0..1); a hard constraint like an allergy is 1

traveler.description: the traveler this preference is for
